instruction: Set up a shared project workspace for three teams. (1) Create group 'projectx'. (2) Create users alice, bob, charlie and add them all to group 'projectx'. (3) Create /srv/projectx/ owned by root:projectx with permission 2775 (setgid). (4) Inside /srv/projectx/, create subdirectories team_alpha/, team_beta/, team_gamma/. (5) Set team_alpha/ to be writable only by alice (owner alice:projectx, 2770), team_beta/ writable only by bob (owner bob:projectx, 2770), team_gamma/ writable by all projectx members (owner root:projectx, 2775). (6) Create /srv/projectx/README.txt with content 'Project X shared workspace'.
source: 外部参考来源：Ubuntu manpage - useradd(8) (https://manpages.ubuntu.com/manpages/jammy/en/man8/useradd.8.html)；Ubuntu manpage - usermod(8) (https://manpages.ubuntu.com/manpages/jammy/en/man8/usermod.8.html)；Ubuntu manpage - chmod(1) (https://manpages.ubuntu.com/manpages/jammy/en/man1/chmod.1.html)

parameters.command: echo {CLIENT_PASSWORD} | sudo -S bash -c 'userdel -r alice 2>/dev/null; userdel -r bob 2>/dev/null; userdel -r charlie 2>/dev/null; groupdel projectx 2>/dev/null; rm -rf /srv/projectx'

command: import pyautogui; import time; time.sleep(0.5); pyautogui.click({SCREEN_WIDTH_HALF}, {SCREEN_HEIGHT_HALF}); time.sleep(0.5); pyautogui.hotkey('ctrl', 'alt', 't'); time.sleep(0.5)

result.command: group_ok='false'; getent group projectx >/dev/null 2>&1 && group_ok='true'; alice_ok='false'; id alice >/dev/null 2>&1 && id -nG alice | grep -qw projectx && alice_ok='true'; bob_ok='false'; id bob >/dev/null 2>&1 && id -nG bob | grep -qw projectx && bob_ok='true'; charlie_ok='false'; id charlie >/dev/null 2>&1 && id -nG charlie | grep -qw projectx && charlie_ok='true'; root_dir_ok='false'; [ -d /srv/projectx ] && [ "$(stat -c '%G' /srv/projectx)" = 'projectx' ] && [ "$(stat -c '%a' /srv/projectx)" = '2775' ] && root_dir_ok='true'; alpha_ok='false'; [ -d /srv/projectx/team_alpha ] && [ "$(stat -c '%U:%G' /srv/projectx/team_alpha)" = 'alice:projectx' ] && [ "$(stat -c '%a' /srv/projectx/team_alpha)" = '2770' ] && alpha_ok='true'; beta_ok='false'; [ -d /srv/projectx/team_beta ] && [ "$(stat -c '%U:%G' /srv/projectx/team_beta)" = 'bob:projectx' ] && [ "$(stat -c '%a' /srv/projectx/team_beta)" = '2770' ] && beta_ok='true'; gamma_ok='false'; [ -d /srv/projectx/team_gamma ] && [ "$(stat -c '%U:%G' /srv/projectx/team_gamma)" = 'root:projectx' ] && [ "$(stat -c '%a' /srv/projectx/team_gamma)" = '2775' ] && gamma_ok='true'; readme_ok='false'; [ -f /srv/projectx/README.txt ] && grep -q 'Project X shared workspace' /srv/projectx/README.txt && readme_ok='true'; echo "group_ok=$group_ok"; echo "alice_ok=$alice_ok"; echo "bob_ok=$bob_ok"; echo "charlie_ok=$charlie_ok"; echo "root_dir_ok=$root_dir_ok"; echo "alpha_ok=$alpha_ok"; echo "beta_ok=$beta_ok"; echo "gamma_ok=$gamma_ok"; echo "readme_ok=$readme_ok"
